title: Grok 5 — The Biggest AI News Is Here (Musk’s AGI Bet)
summary: A YouTube video breakdown of rumors and leaks around xAI's Grok 5 model, which Musk claims is approaching AGI. The video covers xAI's hardware infrastructure (Colossus 2: 1-gigawatt cluster, 500,000 GPUs built in 122 days), missed Q1 launch dates, and comparative positioning against Claude, GPT-5, and Gemini. The presenter grades rumor credibility and discusses pricing models and safety considerations.
